projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: v1.11.2 (free tier + UX polish) shipped; ci_post_clone.sh in place so Xcode Cloud builds cleanly.
projects.nextStep: Add a TestFlight (Internal Testing) post-action to the Xcode Cloud workflow so builds reach TestFlight.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Being reimagined — 2-3 photos, ML detects anatomical control points (toe tips, ball widths, arch, heel) to define the 2-D sole shape. 3-D dropped for now.
projects.nextStep: Claude is rebuilding the capture + measurement flow around control-point detection.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Vision Phase 1 shipped — the daily transit loop — plus rendering fixes, expandable Strategy/Not-Self guidance, and the dating on/off toggle.
projects.nextStep: Reviewing the new TestFlight build; then pick the next move (social layer, daily-loop notifications, or swiping go-live).

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed — the bundle name was the generic word 'Weather'; now uniquely 'Weather: Between Us'. Committed (85d66ce).
projects.nextStep: Trigger a fresh Xcode Cloud build (will be build 22) and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive built but blocked — the GitHub token needs a Workflows permission to push workflow files.
projects.nextStep: Add the Workflows permission to your GitHub token so the keep-alive can land; smoke-test auto-capture on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: N5-N1 grammar + full N4-N1 vocab shipped. Consolidating the homepage into rainbow-segmented progress bars — Kana, Kanji, Vocab, Grammar — each showing SRS state per category.
projects.nextStep: Claude is building the consolidated bars; will stage for greenlight.

projects.name: PAPPY
projects.note: v2.5.10 (billing null-guard + crash fix) deployed to Firebase and live for users.

projects.name: irons-holistic
projects.note: Static recreation of irons.be deployed and live.
